name: support-response
description: Customer support replies via email, chat, or ticket system
usage_hint: Use for customer support replies — email, chat, or ticket responses to a customer who has a question or problem. Speed and resolution matter more than polish.

criteria.name: response-resolution
criteria.description: Support exists to solve problems; resolution is the only metric that matters

criteria.name: emotional-intelligence
criteria.description: Frustrated customers need acknowledgment before solutions

criteria.name: technical-accuracy
criteria.description: Wrong answers create more tickets and erode trust

criteria.name: readability
criteria.description: Clear responses reduce back-and-forth and resolution time

criteria.name: customer-empathy
criteria.description: Empathetic responses improve satisfaction scores and reduce churn

criteria.name: tone-alignment
criteria.description: Support tone reflects directly on brand perception

criteria.name: accessibility-inclusivity
criteria.description: Responses must be clear to all customers regardless of technical background
